channel.title: Ml on jtheol
channel.description: Recent content in Ml on jtheol

item.title: Tor Network Traffic Classification
item.description: I analyzed data and built a model to classify Tor traffic with using data collected by the Canadian Institute for Cybersecurity. The process of building the model was initially loading and preprocessing network traffic data, including encoding categorical variables and removing potential sources of data leakage. Subsequently, splitting the dataset into training, validation, and testing sets. Two models, Logistic Regression and Random Forest, are trained and evaluated. For both models, learning curves are plotted to visualize performance and detect signs of overfitting.
